title: Gods & Heroes (Origins)
description:
Origins Gods & Heroes Mod

Speedster.
kryptonian.
Spider-man.
Blacksmith.
Builder.
Nightcrawler.
Namur.
Vampire.
Ars Sorceress.

and other yet to come.
body:
![Fino Origins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37abd39f859285b3523ba81f0c337b9f0c3b6596.png)

# **Motivation to Create this Mod**

I was already tired of looking for modern superhero mods on the internet, and the ones I found were always the same, where you had to have the character's clothes, etc...
I've always wondered what it would be like **if I had the powers on me** and not in a suit.
Thinking about it, I created this mod, a mod of superheroes and gods.

#  Discord: https://discord.gg/EEmXHvkt3g

# **Description of the Heroes and Gods:**

In this mod, you can be:

- **Ars Sorceress**: With the Mod Ars Nouveau installed you can chose this origin and become the absolute master of magics. **(FORGE ONLY)**

- **The Spider-Man**: For those who always come to games to swing from web to web, and have fun climbing buildings.

- **Nightcrawler**: For that person who likes to play like a rogue or just teleport around to kill some time, not big changes.

- **Speedster (The Flash)**: For those who like to run across maps, explore faraway places, and return home quickly, enjoy a faster game. (you'll want to install food mods for this one)

- **Vampire**: For that person who want to be the night, immortal, and a really new way to play the game, this is for you.

- **Kryptonian (Superman)**: For those who want to feel like a superior being among all others, the one who, when we look up to the sky, is there, whether for good or for bad.

- **Namur**: For that person who loves the ocean, and want to play like a fish... like a fish on lots of steroids.

- **Blacksmith**: For that guy who always likes to play only within a village and make his entire base there, thinking about him and the best development during the game with several progress mechanics.

- **The Builder**: For those who just like to play in the creative mode.

This mod is just the start of the many ideas and projects I've already started to improve it. I count on your support to download and spread this superhero mod and motivate me more and more.

# **Language**
In the version 1.1.1 and above the language PTBR and EN are in the same jar, now you can chose to change in the minecraft settings

# **Recommendations**

Because of the amount of food Origins consumes, I recommend downloading these or other mods that add food to the game.
For the faster speed, I recomend download StepUp Mod.
Because of the trident loyalt enchant I recommend download the Better Trident Mod.

- Meal API.
- The Chocolate Mod Remastered.
- StepUp Mod.
- Better Trident Mod.

# **Dependency:**

- Origins Mod
- Pehkui
- Soulbound (Optional)
- TooManyMods (Optional)

# **Observations**

- If you want to blacksmith have the power to lightup furnaces, you have to downlaod TooManyOrigins (only work on 1.19.2 and 1.20.x)

## Forge & Fabric

- Version 1.6.0 and above is Forge and Fabric


# Future New Heroes Updates:

- Ant Man **(Marvel)**
- Fell Free to suggest any origins on my discord.

# Play with my modpack too: https://modrinth.com/modpack/kls
- I'm creating this modpack to develop some kind of difficulty for the origins I'm creating, making the game more intense and probably too difficult to play as a normal human.
